item.name: Butterfly Ray
item.description:
Sadly, the tiresome scholarly squabbles about which winged insect these oversized rays actually resemble continue apace.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This elongated oval ray looks like an oversized butterfly come to rest with its wings unfurled. Referencing the wavekin's color, some needlessly petty naturalists insist that it actually bears closer resemblance to a moth.
